title: Horror Interface (GUI)
body:
**an interface for horror fans**

for a more beautiful interface use: [GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blackgui) | or: [GUI 1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dark-smooth-gui) | [GUI 2](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode)
